problem id: 57b03b2b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(7)

examples:
  00100110 -> 10011000
  11010000 -> 01000011
  01010010 -> 01001001
  01010111 -> 01011101
  10110001 -> 11000111
  10101110 -> 10111011
  10001011 -> 00101111
  01100100 -> 10010001
  00111101 -> 11110100
  01101110 -> 10111001

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 10000011
